title: Retail Sales Executive (Up to $5k)
description:
Job description

We are looking for an experienced end-to-end Customer Experience Specialist to join us as a City Guide, 丰城导购员 for Gain City! This position will report directly to our BD Director with a secondary reporting to our Showroom Manager.


The City Guide at Gain City will be responsible for:

1. Understanding and Introduction of Electronics Brands and Products respectively.

2. Oversee, understand and evaluate customer requirements to propose electronics products respectively.

3. Enhancing in-store customer experience by planning and guiding customer

4. Cross-selling products across different departments and showrooms.

5. Driving sales of high priority products and premium brands.

6. Work closely with the Business Development Team to track deal performance, gather feedbacks, and proposal of strategy enhancements.

This role requires deep knowledge of all current promotions, discount mechanics, and brand-specific offers across all product categories. The City Guide actively recommends tailored deals, upsells products, cross sells across outlets, and connects customers with the appropriate Sales Executives when needed. The goal is to increase bundle purchases and high priority product sales through superior deal management and customer engagement.


Key Responsibilities:

Promotion & Discount Expertise:

  • Stay fully informed about all Gain City promotions, discount structures, and brand-specific deals across all product categories.
  • Proactively promote the latest deals and offers to customers, offering product bundles, EW, complementary products to increase basket size.

In-store Customer Experience Enhancement:

  • Engage with customers, answer inquiries, and ensure that promotional signage and materials are visible and accurate.
  • Plan customer’s journey by understanding needs and recommending the right products to create memorable shopping experiences.

Premium Upsell & Showroom Cross-sell:

  • Identify opportunities to upsell higher-margin products and cross-sell complementary items based on customer preferences.
  • Recommend products not available in the current showroom, offering options from other Gain City showrooms to ensure customers get the full product range.

Sales Target & Store Performance:

  • Support the store’s sales objectives by driving deal-focused initiatives and maximizing promotional opportunities.
  • Suggest improvements to promotions and discounts based on customer feedback and sales data to optimize future campaigns.

Training & Knowledge Sharing:

  • Stay updated on new product launches and features to offer informed recommendations.
  • Collaborate with the marketing and promotions teams to align in-store deals with broader advertising campaigns.

Qualifications:

  • Experience in retail, sales, or deal management, preferably in consumer electronics or home appliances.
  • Strong knowledge of promotion mechanics, discount strategies, upselling, and cross-selling techniques.
  • Excellent customer service skills with a passion for enhancing customer satisfaction.
  • Proven ability to work in a fast-paced retail environment and manage multiple customers simultaneously.
  • Ability to cross-sell products from other showrooms and coordinate seamless customer solutions.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Able to work retail hours, weekends and Public Holidays

Job summary

Looking for highly experienced retail sales executive

Note:

  • The working location will be at Gain City Megastore at Sungei Kaduk
  • A shuttle bus service is available from Yew Tee or Choa Chu Kang


Key selling points

  • Annual wage increment
  • Professional and training development
  • Dental Care

postedCompany.description:
GAIN CITY BEST-ELECTRIC PTE LTD

Looking for a challenging and rewarding career in a fast paced organization? Join Gain City!


Established in 1981, Gain City is one of Singapore‘s leading retail brand carrying a wide range of quality air-conditioners, home appliances, audio visual equipment, digital and IT products. It is a multi-faceted organisation with distinctive track records in retail and wholesales operations, manufacturing, maintenance and repair, commercial, industrial and residential projects, import and export.
 

Gain City the leading home-grown appliances and electronic retail store is also proud to be the recipient of the prestigious Enterprise 50 Award (5 times), Singapore Prestige Brand Award 2011 (Winner, SPBA-Heritage Brand). Gain City has also previously awarded other celebrated award such as the ISO 9001-2000 Certification, Super Brand (2004,2005,2006,2008 & 2009) and Singapore Promising Brand Award (2006).
postedCompany.name: GAIN CITY BEST-ELECTRIC PTE LTD
